title: LITTLE FREE LIBRARY - 211info
text: LITTLE FREE LIBRARY LITTLE FREE LIBRARY Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides book-sharing boxes in local neighborhoods. Individuals can take any books available and donate any unwanted reading materials to share with the community. Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Not applicable (715) 690-2488 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (715) 690-2488 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Visit website for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Nationwide Services: Book/Magazine Donation Programs Public Libraries If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge.
